text: Peter recalls the word of the Lord: John baptized with water, but you shall be baptized with the Holy Spirit
To the angel of the church in Ephesus: these things saith he that holdeth the seven stars in his right hand and walketh in the midst of the seven golden candlesticks
Yet this you have to your credit: you hate the deeds of the Nicolaitans, which I also hate
To the angel of the church in Smyrna: these things saith the first and the last, who was dead and is alive
To the angel of the church in Pergamos: these things saith he which hath the sharp two-edged sword
To the angel of the church in Thyatira: these things saith the Son of God, whose eyes are like a flame of fire and whose feet are like fine brass
To the rest in Thyatira who do not hold this teaching and have not known the depths of Satan: I will lay on you no other burden
A few in Sardis have not defiled their garments — they shall walk with me in white, for they are worthy
To the angel of the church in Philadelphia: these things saith he that is holy and true, who hath the key of David — he opens and no one shuts, he shuts and no one opens
To the angel of the church of the Laodiceans: these things saith the Amen, the faithful and true witness, the beginning of the creation of God
